snippet.title: Prof BOF Tries Out A 6 MAN BLITZ CURLER ATTACK But…It Ends In PAIN😭
snippet.description:
Blitz Curler is considered one of the most OP skills in eFootball 26 — so Prof BOF stacked SIX attackers with Blitz Curler in one team to see if it would break the game. Spoiler: it didn’t go as planned. Blitz Curler 107 Yamal, Blitz Curler Salah, blitz Curler Rumme, Blitz Curler Messi, Blitz Curler Del Piero, Blitz Curler Mbappe, Blitz Curler Zola, Blitz Curler Neymar, Blitz Curler Bale, Blitz Curler Son Heung Min.

In this video, I test a full attacking setup built entirely around Blitz Curler to find out whether skill stacking actually works or creates problems in real matches.

This experiment covers:
✅ 6-man Blitz Curler attacking setup
✅ Gameplay highlights & failures
✅ Why too many OP skills can hurt balance
✅ Tactical flaws exposed mid-match
✅ Final lesson: OP on paper ≠ OP in-game

If you’re thinking of building a Blitz Curler-heavy squad, watch this first. #efootball #efootball2026 #bofgames
